description: Registry item manifest — lists components, layouts, and assets needed from Rocketing registries. This file is populated before the starter is cloned, based on the app's requirements from earlier pipeline phases.

layouts.name: marketing-layout
layouts.notes: Public marketing page layout with header/footer

layouts.name: dashboard
layouts.notes: Dashboard layout with stat cards and recent items

_instructions: Agents should check item status. 'pending' = not yet installed. 'installed' = available in the codebase. 'skipped' = not needed. Update status as items are resolved.
